projects.name: jonnyhaynes-web
projects.description: My personal website — a static site built with React, Vite & TypeScript.
projects.pitch: My personal portfolio — a React + Vite SPA with live GitHub and Spotify data, a Modern Yorkshire theme, and an interactive topographic background.
projects.challenge: Keeping API secrets server-side while the site stays fully static: data is baked to JSON by scheduled GitHub Actions, with one Vercel function for live Spotify now-playing, so nothing sensitive ever reaches the client bundle.

projects.name: skillswap
projects.description: A community skill-swapping platform that connects neighbours to exchange knowledge and services — offer skills, propose swaps, and chat in real time.

lastCommit.message: fix: stop requesting last_seen_at on profiles as anon (#9)

projects.pitch: A community skill-swapping platform — neighbours offer, request and swap skills, with real-time messaging and reviews.
projects.challenge: Auditing every Supabase RLS policy to close a profile-PII leak, without breaking cross-user features like messaging and the verified-neighbour badge.

projects.name: sitwellcc-web
projects.description: Website for Sitwell Cycling Club — built with Astro, React islands, Tailwind CSS, and Sanity CMS.

lastCommit.message: Update challenge description in portfolio JSON

projects.pitch: The Sitwell Cycling Club website — an Astro site with Sanity CMS, live ride listings and a contact form.
projects.challenge: Computing honest ride distance and elevation from raw GPX.

projects.name: freestyle-libre-mcp-server
projects.description: An MCP (Model Context Protocol) server that gives Claude access to Abbott Freestyle Libre CGM (continuous glucose monitor) data.
projects.pitch: An MCP server giving Claude access to Freestyle Libre glucose data.
projects.challenge: Reaching glucose data through LibreLinkUp's unofficial follower-account auth, and abstracting three providers behind one clean set of MCP tools.

projects.name: apollo-events-bridge
projects.description: Reads Apollo event embeds from Discord and serves them as JSON for a website.
projects.pitch: Reads Apollo's Discord event embeds and serves them as JSON for a website.
projects.challenge: Parsing Apollo's undocumented Discord event embeds — via a bot with Message Content Intent — so the format can be re-derived when Apollo changes it.

projects.name: karma

lastCommit.message: Add portfolio configuration for Strava and Komoot

projects.pitch: Syncs cycling activities between Strava and Komoot.
projects.challenge: Syncing Strava and Komoot across two OAuth flows and rate limits, converting activity streams to GPX with atomic, resumable state.
